title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Deeply ambivalent about any value in this policy. But what gives me pause is that the most internet-poisoned human being, Taylor Lorenz, is incredibly against this. Tweeting from her vivarium.
